title: FCOn Function
description: Determines if the specified robot is executing the force control function.
notes:
This identifies whether the specified robot is executing the force control function or not.

On will be returned when the force control function is active due to a CF qualifier following the completion of a motion command, or when the force control function is active due to FCKeep.
examples:
Function main If FCOn(1) = Off Then
   Print "Force Control is off" EndIf
Fend
